assets.name: lecture_05_figure_05.png
assets.rationale: This frame gives the best balance between completeness and legibility. The main action formula across the top is already fully present and clear, while the lower line has advanced far enough to show the transition to the generic integral-of-the-Lagrangian form without being as hand-occluded as the last candidate. Candidate 1 is too early, candidate 2 is less complete, and candidate 4 is slightly more cluttered by the live writing stroke.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: is equal to the integral of the Lagrangian.
assets.caption_hint: Particle action written as a Lagrangian integral

assets.name: lecture_05_figure_06.png
assets.rationale: This frame gives the cleanest combined view of the two key lines: the action written as an integral at the top and the corresponding Lagrangian isolated on the second line. The later candidates are very similar, but they are slightly more presenter-dominant and do not improve the mathematical completeness. Candidate 1 is the sharpest stable documentary frame for this moment.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: the Euler-Lagrange equations to this Lagrangian.
assets.caption_hint: Action and Lagrangian for a relativistic particle
